resources.string: You will read a short familiar passage aloud for 30 seconds. Hold the phone at a comfortable distance and read in your natural speaking voice. If you stumble on a word, keep going. The test ends automatically after 30 seconds.

This is a smartphone variant of a clinical read aloud task. The numbers it produces are for personal tracking on this device and are not directly comparable to a clinician administered voice assessment.
The microphone records only while you read. The recording is processed on your phone and never leaves the device.
Voice test unavailable on this device
Microphone access is required for this test. Voice test is off for now.
Some background noise. Recording will still work.
Find a quieter room and we will re check the level.

You wish to know all about my grandfather. Well, he is nearly ninety three years old, yet he still thinks as swiftly as ever. He dresses himself in an ancient black frock coat, usually several buttons missing. A long beard clings to his chin, giving those who observe him a pronounced feeling of the utmost respect. When he speaks, his voice is just a bit cracked and quivers a trifle. Twice each day he plays skillfully and with zest upon a small organ. Except in the winter when the snow or ice prevents, he slowly takes a short walk in the open air each day. We have often urged him to walk more and smoke less, but he always answers, “Banana oil!” Grandfather likes to be modern in his language.
You read the passage for %1$d seconds. Your voice was steady most of the time.
You read the passage for %1$d seconds. Your voice had some variation.
You read the passage for %1$d seconds. Your voice varied more than usual today.
You read the passage for %1$d seconds.
Voice patterns change over time. These numbers will be most useful when compared against your own past tests on this phone, not against anyone else’s results.
Save audio of your voice tests for personal review
When on, your voice recordings are saved on this phone so you can listen back to them yourself. They never leave your device. When off, only the test results are saved, not the recordings.
Set a lock screen on this phone to enable audio retention.
Save audio of your voice tests?
Audio is saved on this phone, never leaves your device. You can turn this off any time, and existing recordings will be deleted.
Turn off recording retention? Existing recordings will be deleted from this phone immediately.
